meaning: n.蛛ｶ蜒丞ｴ勤亨,霑勛ｺｦ蟠勤亨,驍ｪ逾槫ｴ勤亨
examples: Their affection for her soon increased almost to idolatry.
They forget God, they turn to idolatry.
But one of the problems with idolatry is that it gives them less than their due.
We were educated in royalism: no wonder if some of us retain that idolatry still.
